item.dc:creator: fortytwoembers

item.title: Best Christmas news ever
item.description: I went for surgery recently to have a large cyst removed from my ovary. The right ovary and fallopian tubes were also taken and the doctor took samples from the uterine wall to biopsy as well. I wasn't super worried that it'd come back as bad news, but I was low-key worried. Doctor just called to tell me everything was benign. Happy Christmas to me.
item.dc:creator: AmoAmasAmant

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: The facebook lie.
item.description: Can we just do this please? I don't want to see anything if it isn't posted by people I'm already friends with. That's it, that's all I want. It's that fucking simple. Hiding posts means you just put more shit on my feed to see what sticks. Nothing is ever going to stick. Even if I am interested, I'm reporting it on principle anyway because that's not what I'm on facebook for.
item.dc:creator: sascottsn

item.title: I'm shocked...
item.description: The House Ethics Committee found evidence that former Rep. Matt Gaetz paid tens of thousands of dollars to women for sex or drugs on at least 20 occasions, including paying a 17-year-old girl for sex in 2017, according to a final draft of the panel’s report on the Florida Republican, obtained by CNN. https://www.cnn.com/2024/12/23/politics/matt-gaetz-house-ethics-report/index.html #gaetz #shocked
item.dc:creator: Exdeath5000
